$comment: Registry entry for submitting mcpm to the official MCP Registry. Submit via https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io or PR to modelcontextprotocol/servers.
name: io.github.getmcpm/cli
title: mcpm
description: MCP package manager with built-in trust scoring. Search, install, audit, and manage MCP servers across Claude Desktop, Cursor, VS Code, and Windsurf. Also runs as an MCP server itself — agents can search, install, and audit servers programmatically.
